mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_role_change_log (user_id, old_role, new_role, old_managed_dept_codes, new_managed_dept_codes, old_managed_company_cd, new_managed_company_cd, changed_by, changed_at, reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{oldRole}, #{newRole}, #{oldManagedDeptCodes}, #{newManagedDeptCodes}, #{oldManagedCompanyCd}, #{newManagedCompanyCd}, #{changedBy}, #{changedAt}, #{reason})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, old_role, new_role, old_managed_dept_codes, new_managed_dept_codes, old_managed_company_cd, new_managed_company_cd, changed_by, changed_at, reason FROM sys_role_change_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY changed_at DESC
